groups:
It does not do to dwell on dreams
- Albus
Happiness can be found in the darkest times

Turn on the light
- Albus

After all this time? Always
- Snape
I solemnly swear I am up to no good
Mischief managed

Fear of a name increases fear
- Hermione

You're a wizard Harry
- Hagrid
It is our choices that show

what we truly are far more than abilities
- Albus

Dobby is a free elf!
- Dobby

Expecto Patronum!
- Harry
Just because you have the emotional range

of a teaspoon
- Hermione

Nitwit blubber oddment tweak
- Albus
Things we lose have a way of coming back

to us
- Luna
Dobby has no master Dobby is a free elf
It takes great courage to face your enemies

but more to stand up to friends
- Albus
